title: Calendar Holiday Dates
description: Defines the type for specifying holiday dates in calendar components, allowing special styling and behavior for these dates.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Holiday dates by list or predicate.

props.name: Date[]
props.description: An array of Date objects representing specific holiday dates that should be highlighted in the calendar.

props.name: function
props.description: A function that takes a Date parameter and returns a boolean indicating whether that date should be treated as a holiday.
